---
title: "Molly Tseng"
image: file/profile_image.jpeg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:hstseng@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hsiang-ling%EF%BC%88molly%EF%BC%89-tseng-824390297/
---
#### About Me

I am a MS student in Business Analytics at the University of California, San Diego (UCSD).
I have experience in Python and data analysis, and I enjoy exploring datasets and turning data into insights.



<!-- To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>. -->
